text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is here again. We're heading into a
crucial preparation period for the upcoming fall
senior G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This year... Just for this year... I've got to hold off
on my comic prep!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This summer, I need to focus all my energy on
preparing for the autumn Tenno Sho! So King's
new volume will have to be pushed back to
winter...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. And I was so looking forward to reading
it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyagh! King?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Sorry! I'm so sorry! I promise the winter special
won't disappoint!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I suppose it's fine. Running in the autumn Tenno
Sho is more important, after all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you. You've helped me so much, and
now I'm finally going up against Opera O and
Doto!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's right. All three of you are competing.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Although, there might be a fourth racer to look
out for.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? A fourth? Is there someone else people
have been talking about?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As a matter of fact... there's a rather surprising
addition, from what I hear.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You might know her. She won this year's NHK
Mile Cup.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaah?! You don't mean the girl who was
number four, do you?! The classic-year cutie?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you do know her? She may be in her
classic year, but people are expecting she'll be
contending in the senior medium-distance races
before long.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Make sure she doesn't trip you up, okay? Ta-ta
for now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-wh-what the?! Number four coming out of
nowhere! Is she an enemy?! Is she a friend?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Were you listening, Trainer?! She's gonna be there!
choice_data_list:
Seems like we have another strong competitor
on our hands.

Seems like we have another strong competitor
on our hands.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: YES! But more than that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My heart... is aflame! I can't believe the day we
can run together is so close!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There's so much I want to show her on the
racecourse! Just like how King showed so much to
me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I want her to know the potential of Umamusume
and the magnificence of the Twinkle Series. I just
have to show her!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
WOOO! I can feel my inner big sister budding
from within!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our spirits surge at the news of this unexpected
new challenger joining the autumn Tenno Sho.
